source: Hu, Y., Liu, S., Yue, Y., et al. (2025). Memory in the Age of AI Agents.
relevance: Provides the baseline architecture for cognitive architectures and agentic memory taxonomies.

source: Packer, C., et al. (2023). MemGPT: Towards LLMs as Operating Systems.
relevance: Explains the context window bottleneck and virtual OS paging for LLMs.

source: Foer, Josh. 'Moonwalking with Einstein: The Art and Science of Remembering Everything'.
relevance: Anchor text exploring the 'Memory Palace' and how human culture shifted toward offloading recall to external memory.
